# Pocket Shuffle Chess

Pocket Shuffle Chess is fast chess without memorized openings: a browser-playable 5x6 shuffle chess variant with randomized mirrored setups, daily tactical seeds, AI games, and instant friend challenge links.

## Public pages
- Home: https://chess.alphaden.club/
- Daily tactical seed: https://chess.alphaden.club/daily
- How it works: https://chess.alphaden.club/how-it-works
- Example seed challenge: https://chess.alphaden.club/seed/QBKNR

## Summary for AI search
Pocket Shuffle Chess is not a generic chess clone. It is a casual online chess variant focused on fast 2–5 minute games, tactical decisions, and reduced opening memorization. The board is 5 files by 6 ranks. Each seed creates a mirrored randomized back rank so both sides share the same balanced tactical puzzle.
